codeReview.summary: The fix correctly resolves the onboarding redirect header mismatch and landing-page auth detection, but one prior blocking area remains unresolved: pillar defaults can still stick to legacy values before custom pillars load, so dynamic-pillar behavior is still not reliably correct for custom users.

issues.description: `pillar` is initialized once from `pillarList[0]` and never re-synced after async pillar loading. `usePillars()` boots with defaults when cache is cold (`src/hooks/usePillars.ts:92`), and defaults are ordered with `'hot-take'` first (`src/lib/constants.ts:2`). For users with custom pillars, generation can remain on legacy/default pillar state unless manually changed, so the prior blocking fallback behavior is not fully eliminated. Same one-time initialization pattern remains in Ideas (`src/app/(dashboard)/ideas/page.tsx:26`) and Save-to-Library modal (`src/components/generate/GenerateOutput.tsx:73`).

Cache bootstrapping still uses `_lastUserId` before confirming the currently authenticated user, so first render may hydrate with a previous user's cached pillars in same-tab account switches. This violates the intent of strictly user-scoped pillar cache behavior (`_lastUserId` read at line 90, set at line 106).

sharedStateObservations.observation: UI verification procedure in `fullstack-worker` is still not being followed for UI-affecting fixes.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Skill requires agent-browser/manual UI verification (`.factory/skills/fullstack-worker/SKILL.md:23,33,50-52`), but fix transcript skeleton contains no `agent-browser` usage (`worker-transcripts.jsonl` session `e836cb59-7168-4dd7-b528-85f247c938e1`, `contains("agent-browser") == false`).

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mutation-boundary convention remains unenforced in touched generation flows.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Mission AGENTS requires mutations via API routes only (`/Users/anirudhmanjesh/.factory/missions/fbcce583-7257-4bc1-9707-8c0ee4dcc7ec/AGENTS.md`, Data Access). `GenerateOutput` still performs direct client DB insert (`src/components/generate/GenerateOutput.tsx:85,89-90`).

summary: Fix commit 05642d5 resolves the onboarding redirect and landing auth blockers from prior scrutiny, but dynamic-pillar blocker remains due to one-time pillar state initialization and `_lastUserId` bootstrap behavior that can still surface legacy or cross-user pillar state.
